changelog.change: · Due to security reasons, we have disabled injection next to our tweak.
· Please do not inject any other tweaks next to our tweak for now. If your device is jailbroken, please allow only YTKPlus in Choicy in the meantime.
· Fixes Rootless reinstall bricks
· Fix missing localization
· Permanently fix an account sign-out bug
· Fix SponsorBlock segments appearing on unrelated videos
· Fix occasional search crashes
· Updated iPA to newer YouTube v21.26
· Add new hook for future YouTube version playback support
· Add playback recovery to restore the original account state
· Add track titles, queue view, and swipe gestures to Mini Player
· Add new FHD-quality icons and refresh existing icons
· Improve backup management by automatically cleaning saved backups and removing leftover backup files from document storage
· Improve lyrics API handling for the audio player
· Improve audio player queue switching for a smoother experience
· Improve gesture handling
· Fix a crash on launch on iOS 27.x
· Fix "Open in YTKPlus" Safari extension to correctly use a single App ID instead of two
· Fix tab reversing issue
· Fix color issues when returning to YouTube after the app enters the background
· Fix activation color turning completely black in Light Mode
· Fix Shorts FS compatibility for newer YouTube versions
· Performance improvements and bug fixes
· Updated iPA to newer YouTube v21.25

descriptionlist.longdescription:
In-App Purchase: $3.99

In-App Settings:
• Download videos, audio, Shorts, and post images.
• Enjoy full-speed 🚀 downloads with a built-in Download Manager.
• Built in a modern Video and Audio player.
• Built in a modern custom Sleeptimer.
• Import videos to Photos or directly into the YTKPlus library.
• Block all advertisements for a clean experience.
• Play media in the background.
• Stream HD videos over Wi-Fi, 3G, 4G, or 5G.
• Streaming and downloading 2k-4k videos on Supported Device ip15 and later.
• Set default playback quality for Wi-Fi and Cellular.
• Customize or hide tab bar icons and layouts.
• Includes built-in SponsorBlock integration.
• Picture in Picture (PiP).
• And many more settings…
• Supports iPadOS.


IPA & TrollStore Version:
  • Instructions available here...


    • · OR copy this source and add it to ur source list on Altstore, FlekSt0re, Esign etc..
    · https://repo.ikghd.me/repo.json

    Refund Policy:
  • Refund page


    • Subscription | Key & Devices:
    · subscription valid for (99 days)
    · The key is for 1 device and is transferable

    For more information, refer to the FAQ page:
  • FAQ page
